headline: Why China Could Become Costco's Next Membership Catalyst
summary: Costco's early Executive Membership success in China, paired with warehouse expansion, could boost fee income, shopping frequency and loyalty.

headline: DoorDash shares are trading higher. The company announced it is exiting four countries across its Deliveroo and Wolt brands - Qatar, Singapore, Japan, and Uzbekistan.
